Jharkhand Board JAC Class 10th Matric Exam 2025 Result
GOVERNMENTJharkhand Academic Council JAC has released the Result of Secondary Matric Examination 2025. All the candidates who are Enrolled and Appeared for class 10th of the year 2025 can download and Check Result / Subject Wise Marks. This year Jharkhand Board JAC Class 10th Exam will be held from 11 February 2025 to 03 March 2025 and JAC Xth Exam Result Declared on 27 May 2025.
—Check NotificationActive

GOVERNMENTJharkhand Academic Council has released the Jharkhand Teacher Eligibility Test JHTET 2026 Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 21/04/2026 to 02/06/2026.candidates should read the JAC JHTET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the JHTET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Primary and Junior Level, information and other types of information and then apply.
—02/06/2026Closing Soon

—07/06/2026Closing Soon

Bihar Board Class 10th Matric Exam Result, Scrutiny and Compartment Result 2026
GOVERNMENTBihar School Examination Board (BSEB) Bihar Board release the results for the Class 10th Matriculation Annual Board Exam 2026. The answer key has already been released for enrolled candidates. Candidates can check it and verify their answers. Candidates with objections to any answers can submit them within the deadline and time specified by the board. After the objection process is complete, the BSEB will declare the final result. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll code and roll number on the official website. The official result 29 March 2026.

Chhattisgarh Board CGBSE Result 2020
GOVERNMENTChhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education CGBSE Raipur will release the results of its High School Class 10 th and Intermediate Class 12th on today, June 23, 2020. Those candidates who have participated in this exam can check the result online, whose link is available in Some Useful Important Section.

Maharashtra Board SSC Result 2020
GOVERNMENTMaharashtra HSSC Board will release its SSC High School Class 10 result Today i.e. on 29 July, 2020. Any candidates who have attended class 10 of Maharashtra (Pune, Nagpur, Aurangabad, Mumbai, Kolhapur, Amravati, Nashik, Latur, Kankan) board and are waiting for the result, will get their result Today 29 July 2020. You can see it from 01 PM on 29 July 2020, whose link will be available Some Useful Important Link Section.
—Check NotificationActive

Any candidates who have attended class 12 of WBBSE board and are waiting for the result, will get their Intermediate result Today 17 July 2020. You can see it from 4 Pm on 17 July 2020, whose link will be available Some Useful Important Link Section.

MP Board MP RSK Class 5th V & Class 8th VIII Exam Result 2026
GOVERNMENTRajya Shiksha Kendra Madhya Pradesh MP Board will will release the results for the Class 5th and Class 8th Annual Exam 2026. The RSKMP will declare the board result today 25/03/2026 at 01:30 PM. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll number on the official website. The official result date will be announced now. RSKMP Class V and VIII 2026 Exam result is coming today 25 March 2026 at 01:30 PM.
